listings.description: ***Motivated seller, please make an irresistible offer!!!***Welcome to 107 Appletree Dr NE, a spacious and beautifully maintained 4-bedroom, 3.5-bath colonial nestled in the established NON HOA Carrvale community of historic Leesburg. Situated on a flat and usable .24-acre lot with fruit trees and a fully fenced backyard, this three-level home offers the perfect blend of comfort, charm, and convenience. Inside, you'll discover an updated kitchen boasting quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, including a new stove, and ample cabinetry. The kitchen seamlessly flows into the bright and inviting 3-season sunroom, which overlooks the backyard. The upstairs level features generous-sized bedrooms with new carpet and an additional laundry room for convenience. Step outside to the spacious deck and private fenced yard-ideal for entertaining, pet care, gardening, or relaxing evenings outdoors. The fully finished walk-up basement adds incredible flexibility with a den, kitchenette, laundry room with a new washer, and direct access to the backyard, making it ideal for guests, multi-generational living, a home office, gym, or recreation space. Major updates include a newer HVAC system, Water Filtration System ($9,000 Value) and a 30-year architectural roof installed in 2016, offering peace of mind for years to come. The oversized 2-car garage and three finished levels provide abundant storage and functional living space for today's lifestyle. Located in the desirable Carrvale neighborhood, residents enjoy a quiet, tree-lined setting just minutes from everything Leesburg has to offer. Conveniently close to historic downtown Leesburg featuring award-winning restaurants, breweries, coffee shops, boutiques, and year-round community events. Nearby shopping includes Leesburg Premium Outlets, Village at Leesburg, grocery stores, fitness centers, and everyday conveniences. Outdoor enthusiasts will love proximity to Ida Lee Park & Recreation Center, the W&OD Trail, local wineries and breweries, parks, and scenic Loudoun County attractions. Commuters will appreciate quick access to Route 7, Route 15, the Dulles Greenway, and Dulles International Airport. This home combines classic colonial charm, functional living space, thoughtful updates, and an unbeatable location in one of Loudoun County's most sought-after communities. Don't miss this incredible opportunity to own in the heart of Leesburg!

Nestled in the prestigious Stratford community, this exquisite Colonial-style residence offers a harmonious blend of luxury and comfort, perfect for those seeking an elevated lifestyle. With a generous 3,054 square feet of meticulously designed living space, this home has undergone significant renovations in 2023, ensuring modern elegance throughout. Step inside to discover an inviting open floor plan that seamlessly connects the family room, dining area, and kitchen, creating an ideal space for both entertaining and everyday living. The family room, adorned with built-ins and large windows, invites natural light, while the kitchen boasts ample table space, perfect for casual dining. High-end appliances, including a sleek refrigerator, dishwasher, and stove, make culinary endeavors a delight. The home features four spacious bedrooms, including a luxurious primary suite complete with an en-suite bath, offering a private retreat. Each bathroom is thoughtfully designed, showcasing modern fixtures and finishes that elevate daily routines. The fully finished basement adds versatility, providing additional living space for recreation or relaxation. Exterior highlights include a beautifully landscaped corner lot, enhancing curb appeal and providing a sense of privacy. Enjoy outdoor living on the expansive deck, perfect for summer gatherings or quiet evenings under the stars. The community amenities are equally impressive, featuring a sparkling outdoor pool, jogging paths, and playgrounds, fostering a vibrant neighborhood atmosphere. Additional conveniences include an attached two-car garage with a garage door opener and ample driveway space for guests. The property is strategically located near the airport and within a mile of public transportation, ensuring easy access to the surrounding area. With its combination of high-end features, thoughtful renovations, and a welcoming community, this home is not just a place to live but a lifestyle to embrace. Experience the perfect blend of luxury and comfort in this stunning Stratford residence, where every detail has been curated for your enjoyment.

PRICED TO SELL! Great opportunity to own this fantastic all brick home on a quarter acre corner lot, in an established community with no HOA and where homes are rarely for sale. Located in the heart of downtown Leesburg within walking distance to the historic district with local shops, dining, community events, as well as the Ida Lee Park Recreation Center and Rust Library, and easy access to numerous commuter routes. The welcoming front porch invites you into a spacious, freshly painted home with gorgeous hardwood floors flowing throughout the main level with 3 bedrooms and 2 full bathrooms. The living room has a huge picture window for natural light and built-in shelves surrounding the gas fireplace with glass doors. The dining room, also with a huge picture window, includes chair molding, built-in cabinets and a ceiling fan. The kitchen, with new LVP flooring, includes double sinks, side by side fridge with ice/water dispenser, built in microwave, dishwasher and stove with preferred gas cooking. On the same level, the home boasts 3 generously sized bedrooms, all with cedar lined closets and ceiling fans, with an en-suite bathroom for the primary bedroom. The lower level has a huge family room with a cozy wood burning fireplace and brand new carpeting, plus 2 bonus rooms with lots of potential to use as you see fit, with an abundance of storage room, a half bath, and also a utility sink. Outside you'll find a tastefully landscaped yard and plenty of parking for your family and friends, with the driveway desending behind the home with a lower level parking area and garage. Home has been updated with a new HVAC installed in 2022, providing central heat and AC. The detached outdoor shed has electricity and an exterior charging station next to the concrete pad. Hurry, don't miss this chance to own a great home in one of Leesburg's most desirable locations. Property is offered as-is.

*PRICE IMPROVEMENT! EXCEPTIONAL VALUE MEETS PRIME LOCATION!* Charming 2-bedroom, 2 full bath bungalow in the heart of Downtown Leesburg's Old & Historic District offering the perfect blend of historic character and modern luxury. Nestled on picturesque Ayr Street, this thoughtfully designed home features a secluded retreat-like backyard with a beautiful flagstone patio and detached 1-car garage, along with a long driveway providing additional off-street parking. Inside, enjoy hardwood floors throughout, a gourmet kitchen, custom recessed lighting, custom built-in shelving, custom window seats, two fireplaces, and a fully finished basement that could serve as a third bedroom and includes rough-in plumbing for a 1/2 bath. The upper level offers a spacious primary suite with a private full bath, while the second upstairs full bath features a frameless glass shower enclosure. HVAC and hot water heater were replaced in 2020. Originally built in 1920, 4 Ayr Street is an historic property that was thoughtfully reimagined through a major renovation completed in 2007 by renowned local builder Paul Reimers as part of an award-winning infill development in Downtown Leesburg's Historic District. The home was designed to honor the architectural character and charm of the early 20th-century residences once found along Ayr Street, while seamlessly incorporating modern conveniences and updated living spaces for today's lifestyle. All just moments from shops, restaurants, parks, and everything Downtown Leesburg has to offer.

listings.address: 606 Edwards Ferry Rd NE, Leesburg, VA, 20176
listings.description: Tucked into an ideal in-town Leesburg location, this charming property offers the rare combination of convenience, privacy, and freedom with no HOA. Imagine starting your mornings on the long, welcoming front porch, surrounded by the beauty of the shaded front yard, or unwinding there in the evening as the neighborhood settles into a peaceful rhythm. Inside, the spacious layout is designed for both everyday comfort and effortless entertaining, with an oversized kitchen that serves as the heart of the home and a generously sized living room where family and friends can gather with ease. Outside, the detached two-car garage provides exceptional flexibility for hobbyists, car enthusiasts, or those in need of workshop space, while ample parking ensures plenty of room for guests. Just moments from the shops, restaurants, events, and historic charm of downtown Leesburg, this home offers the perfect balance of accessibility, character, and the privacy that's increasingly hard to find.

Move-in ready and meticulously updated, 601 Newington Pl NE is a stunning 4-bedroom, 3.5-bath home in the heart of historic Leesburg that leaves nothing left to do but unpack. In 2026, the home received a full refresh with newly sanded and polished hardwood floors, fresh interior paint, brand-new light fixtures, and refreshed secondary bathrooms, while the primary suite boasts a fully remodeled spa-like bath (2022). On top of that, a 2-zone HVAC system (2021), an architectural shingle roof (2020) and Tyvek-wrapped siding (2020), a water heater (2023), and energy-efficient windows (2021) throughout. Inside, a grand two-story foyer welcomes you into a light-filled two-story family room, setting the tone for a floor plan built for both everyday living and entertaining. A large main-level office offers the ideal work-from-home setup, while the open gourmet kitchen, complete with a spacious island and upgraded stainless steel appliances, flows effortlessly into the main living space. Upstairs, the primary suite impresses with a soaring cathedral ceiling alongside its fully remodeled spa bath, and generously sized secondary bedrooms provide plenty of room to spread out. A dual-sink vanity in the shared upper-level bath adds everyday convenience for a busy household. The walk-up basement rounds out the home with a bonus room and its own full bath, ideal for a guest suite, additional office, or media room. Outside, enjoy a large, fully fenced backyard, a custom Brazilian wood deck, and a covered pergola, creating your own private retreat for relaxing or hosting year-round. Unbeatable location: Tucked in a quiet Leesburg neighborhood minutes from historic Downtown Leesburg's shops, restaurants, and breweries. Enjoy easy access to the Leesburg Premium Outlets, the W&OD Trail for walking and biking, and Ida Lee Park Recreation Center with its pool, fitness center, and trails. Nature lovers will love nearby Edwards Landing Park and the Potomac River trails, while commuters will appreciate quick access to the Rt. 15 Bypass and Route 7. This is a rare opportunity to own a home with every major system and finish already updated. Schedule your showing today!

Step inside to discover bright, sun-filled living spaces enhanced by abundant natural light and window blinds throughout the home, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. A cozy fireplace serves as the centerpiece of the main living area, while the well-appointed kitchen is a chef's dream, featuring high-end appliances, generous counter space, and ample storage for all your culinary needs. The home offers four spacious bedrooms, each providing a peaceful retreat. The luxurious primary suite serves as a private sanctuary, complete with an elegant en-suite bathroom featuring refined finishes and fixtures. With three full bathrooms and an additional half bath, the home is designed with both comfort and convenience in mind. The fully finished walkout basement adds exceptional versatility, offering the perfect space for a media room, fitness area, game room, home office, or guest retreat. Walkout stairs provide seamless access to the backyard, extending your living and entertaining space outdoors. Outside, the beautifully landscaped yard creates a serene setting for relaxing, gathering with friends and family, or enjoying quiet moments surrounded by nature. The attached front-entry two-car garage is equipped with a Tesla charger, providing added convenience for electric vehicle owners. Additional driveway and ample off-street parking ensure plenty of space for guests. Ideally located in a vibrant community with easy access to parks, trails, shopping, dining, and recreational amenities, this exceptional home offers a lifestyle of comfort, sophistication, and connection. Every detail has been thoughtfully curated to create a residence that feels both luxurious and welcoming. Don't miss the opportunity to make this remarkable Edwards Landing home your own.

Welcome to 306 Lounsbury Ct NE - a beautifully updated split-level home in the heart of historic Leesburg offering NO HOA and fully paid-off solar panels for exceptional long-term value. More than just move-in ready, this home offers a rare combination of comfort, efficiency, and smart homeownership. While many homeowners experienced rising utility costs this winter, the current owners enjoyed electric bills averaging approximately just $10/month thanks to the owned solar panel system. It's a valuable advantage in today's market, providing meaningful monthly savings and protection against increasing energy costs - without the added expense of a solar loan or lease. Inside, the home features a comfortable and functional layout with four bedrooms and two full bathrooms upstairs, including a spacious primary suite with dual closets for practical storage. Natural light fills the home throughout the day, while the skylight creates a warm and inviting ambiance in the evening. The main level is designed for both everyday living and entertaining. The spacious kitchen opens to the family room, where a cozy fireplace and built-in entertainment center create a welcoming gathering space. French glass doors offer flexibility and privacy when desired, while sliding doors lead directly to the backyard for easy indoor-outdoor living. A formal dining room and an additional living area provide plenty of space to host guests, relax, or work comfortably from home. Recent updates include fresh paint throughout, brand-new carpet, updated lighting, refreshed bathrooms, and a clean, modern feel from top to bottom. Additional highlights include a two-car garage, spacious backyard, and an unbeatable location just a few blocks away from Downtown Leesburg, where you can enjoy local shops, restaurants, community events, and historic attractions while still benefiting from a quiet residential setting. The home is also located just one mile from Ida Lee Park, Leesburg's renowned 138-acre recreation destination featuring indoor and outdoor pools, sports fields, walking trails, playgrounds, and a full recreation center. With an improved price, energy-saving features, and a highly desirable location, this is an opportunity you do not want to miss. (Virtually Staged)

Prepare to be impressed by this stunning, fully renovated home where no detail has been overlooked. From the moment you arrive, you'll notice the exceptional curb appeal featuring brand-new siding, roof, windows, gutters, an insulated garage door, exterior door, and a welcoming Trex front porch designed for low-maintenance enjoyment. Step inside to discover a bright, modern interior enhanced by fresh paint, recessed lighting, stylish new fixtures, waterproof flooring, new interior doors, and plush new carpet in bedrooms. The heart of the home is the beautifully designed kitchen, showcasing elegant quartz countertops, 42-inch soft-close cabinetry, and high-end finishes that blend style and functionality. The luxurious bathrooms have been completely remodeled with contemporary finishes, creating spa-inspired spaces you'll love. Major updates including a brand-new HVAC system and water heater provide comfort, efficiency, and peace of mind for years to come. Outdoor living is just as impressive with a spacious deck that's perfect for entertaining, grilling, or simply relaxing with family and friends. Nestled in the sought-after Country Club community with no HOA restrictions, this home offers the rare combination of modern upgrades, timeless design, and true move-in-ready convenience. Opportunities like this are few and far between-- Don't miss your chance to own this exceptional home! Basement bedrooms (NTC).

Crown jewel in coveted Tavistock Farms - with extra large screened in porch and oversized deck overlooking deep yard, trees and common area - rarely available. Beautiful street appeal with welcoming front porch. Enter a soaring open foyer which opens to inviting living room and elegant dining room with bay window. Fabulous kitchen with center island and bar seating, farmhouse sink, high-end stainless appliances, beautiful custom cabinetry -- seamlessly opening to amazing family room with extra high ceilings and banks of windows - fresh, SUNNY, and completely comfortable. Spacious! Five good sized bedrooms - 3.5 baths. Seamless design and feel. Spectacular owners suite with huge bedroom, large ensuite luxury bath with corner soaking tub. The finished walkout lower level is so bright with tons of windows - and offers a large lounging area, space for games, built in cabinets, a fifth bedroom and the third full bath. Recent updates allow you to move right in and enjoy. Highlights include a two-car garage, generous bedroom sizes, abundant natural light, and an unbeatable location. Conveniently located just minutes from historic downtown Leesburg, shopping, dining, commuter routes, parks, and community amenities include a pool, tennis courts, playgrounds, and walking trails.

****BRING ALL OFFERS! **** LENDER INCENTIVES IF USED! Beautifully reimagined with timeless finishes and thoughtful updates throughout, this exceptional residence offers the ease of one-level living paired with the flexibility of expansive interior space-all set on a generous corner lot in a quiet, established neighborhood with no HOA. Designed with both everyday comfort and effortless entertaining in mind, the home features three spacious bedrooms and three full baths, complemented by rich hardwood flooring throughout the main level, fresh designer-inspired paint, and new carpeting in every bedroom. Custom closet systems enhance each bedroom, providing exceptional organization and storage, while the home's accessible design includes the potential for handicap-friendly living with a roll-in shower. At the heart of the home, the renovated kitchen combines style and functionality with abundant workspace, a new microwave, and an inviting layout that flows seamlessly into the main living areas, creating an ideal setting for gathering with family and friends. Outdoor living is equally inviting. A newly constructed Trex deck overlooks the freshly landscaped yard, offering the perfect backdrop for morning coffee, evening relaxation, or outdoor entertaining. Significant recent improvements provide lasting value and peace of mind, including a new HVAC system (August 2025), gutter guards, and an oversized two-car garage with extra depth for storage, hobbies, or workshop space. The fully finished lower level dramatically expands the home's versatility, featuring a private exterior entrance and space well suited for a guest suite, multigenerational living, a home office, fitness studio, or recreation room. With the potential for an additional bedroom, the lower level offers exceptional flexibility to accommodate your evolving lifestyle. Ideally located just minutes from shopping, dining, parks, scenic walking trails, schools, and major commuter routes, this move-in-ready home offers the rare combination of sophisticated updates, functional design, and an established setting-creating an exceptional opportunity for those seeking both comfort and convenience.

OPEN HOUSE, SUNDAY JULY 26th, 11am to 1pm. IMPROVED PRICE! Come see it again for the first time!. You will immediately know you are home upon entering. Enjoy beautiful scraped hardwood flooring throughout the main level, with refinished kitchen cabinets, a new island and granite counters. Newly refinished white cabinets and "agreeable" grey walls perfectly complement each other, and you will thoroughly enjoy the spotless appliances and beautiful view of your fenced yard from the kitchen windows. Enjoy time together with family and friends in the family room off the kitchen, and impress your guests with the freshly painted deck with a newly installed canopy for shade on hot days. The upstairs boasts 4bd/2ba, with the comfort and warmth of newer carpeting. The newly finished downstairs features a nice family room, a partial kitchen, reading/study area, a full bath and a non-conforming 5th bedroom (or den, office, etc). Walkout to the lush and fully fenced backyard, and store your seasonal items in the built-in shed. You will also love the fresh clean look of freshly painted doors and trim, with new stainless hardware on all doors. With a new roof (2019), Trane HVAC, and over-sized gas hot water heater, you're assured many years of carefree living.

Experience elevated living in this extraordinary Leesburg residence, where timeless design meets modern life on a beautifully landscaped 0.38-acre homesite. Extensively renovated with uncompromising attention to detail, this exceptional property offers a rare turnkey opportunity with high-end finishes and sophisticated upgrades throughout. The thoughtfully designed floor plan features 4 generously sized bedrooms and 5 beautifully appointed full bathrooms, creating an ideal balance of comfort and elegance. The heart of the home is a stunning gourmet kitchen outfitted with custom cabinetry, quartz surfaces, a dramatic waterfall island, designer backsplash, and premium Samsung stainless steel appliances-perfectly suited for both everyday living and entertaining. Natural light pours through all-new energy-efficient windows, illuminating the refined interiors accented by luxury flooring, custom millwork, modern lighting, and impeccable craftsmanship at every turn. Spa-inspired bathrooms showcase designer tile selections and upscale finishes, while major system upgrades-including a new HVAC system, electrical panel, water heater, and more-provide peace of mind for years to come. Outdoor spaces are equally impressive, featuring an expansive Trex deck overlooking a private, fully fenced backyard with fresh landscaping and lush new sod. A newly paved driveway and oversized garage with upgraded features complete the home's impressive list of enhancements. Situated in an established neighborhood with no HOA, residents enjoy convenient access to walking trails, top-rated schools, premier shopping, dining, and commuter routes. Just minutes from Leesburg Premium Outlets, Costco, Route 7, and Route 15, this exceptional property delivers the perfect blend of luxury, convenience, and modern living.

Stunning Lockmeade Model in highly sought-after Potomac Crossing, ideally situated at the end of a quiet cul-de-sac on a large, flat, fenced backyard lot. Offering nearly 3,300 square feet on three finished levels, this beautifully updated home features 4 bedrooms, 3.5 baths, a bright open floor plan, and extensive recent renovations throughout. Formal living and dining rooms with bay windows welcome you inside, while the dramatic family room showcases vaulted ceilings, a custom-built fireplace, recessed LED lighting, and a wall of windows overlooking the backyard. The spacious kitchen features a center island and Bosch stainless steel appliances (2021). Major updates completed in late 2024 include fresh interior and exterior paint, all new flooring and carpet, updated lighting and ceiling fans throughout, new blinds, recessed lighting, dimmer switches, motion-sensor floodlights, renovated laundry room with new washer and dryer, and fully remodeled primary and hall bathrooms. The luxurious primary suite offers dual walk-in closets and a stunning new spa-inspired bath with custom shower, upgraded vanities, and enhanced electrical features. Enjoy outdoor living from the enhanced 3-season sunroom and newly improved deck featuring added lighting, ceiling fan, and entertainment space. Additional improvements include a reverse osmosis water filter and faucet installed in the kitchen, waterline installed in the gym, radon mitigation system, upgraded electrical outlets on the rear exterior, new mailbox, garden installation, and decorative rear rock border. The finished lower level offers a spacious recreation room , media room/guest sleeping area, full bath, dedicated gym space, and abundant storage. Recent mechanical and efficiency upgrades include Roof and HVAC (2019), Water Heater (2017), Family Room Windows (2023), Fence (2023), attic insulation (2026), garage floor insulation (2026), all new upper-level windows plus four additional lower-level windows (2026), and a new dedicated HVAC system serving the main level and basement (2026). Potomac Crossing residents enjoy exceptional community amenities including a pool, playgrounds, walking trails, and convenient access to shopping, dining, commuter routes, and schools.

listings.address: 405 Edwards Ferry Rd NE, Leesburg, VA, 20176
listings.description: THIS SOUGHT AFTER HOME IS BACK TO ACTIVE. SELLER CHOSE TO GO "TEMPORARILY OFF" TO DO SOME WORK AND IT IS NOW COMPLETE. AMAZING, UNDER $900,000 FOR AN IN-TOWN HOME!!! Built in 1949 and completely renovated and remodeled in 2019, this stunning home perfectly blends timeless character with modern style and convenience. Situated on over a quarter-acre lot within walking distance of historic downtown Leesburg, This property offers the rare opportunity to enjoy the highly sought-after lifestyle of strolling to local restaurants, boutiques, coffee shops, and the many festivals and community events that make this charming town so special. Featuring an efficient floor plan with 4 bedrooms and 3.5 beautifully updated bathrooms, the home was thoughtfully redesigned with both comfort and entertaining in mind. The inviting open floor plan creates a warm and welcoming atmosphere centered around a lovely kitchen with black granite countertops, open shelving, ample cabinet space, and stylish finishes. The kitchen flows seamlessly into the family room and opens directly onto a large entertaining deck, making indoor-outdoor gatherings effortless. One of the home's most memorable features is the expansive wraparound porch - the perfect place to relax with morning coffee, unwind in the evenings, or host family and friends. It's easy to imagine this becoming the favorite gathering spot for celebrations, holidays, and casual weekends alike. The original fireplace was recently redesigned and updated. The property itself is equally impressive, with mature landscaping that provides beauty and privacy throughout the seasons. Outdoor features include a garden area, charming greenhouse, and play set, creating a backyard that is both functional and picturesque. Additional custom touches throughout the home reflect the builder's attention to detail, including a few distinctive German windows that enhance both the home's character and energy efficiency. This is more than just a house - it's a lifestyle opportunity in one of Northern Virginia's most beloved historic communities. OPEN HOUSE SATURDAY AND SUNDAY! COME ON BY, YOU WILL FALL FOR THIS ONE!

Come home to a place that instantly calms your mind with its expansive serene backyard views. This one of a kind lot will not disappoint with open views and perfect walking distance to downtown Leesburg and Ida Lee Rec Center. This stunning renovated Colonial home in the desirable Exeter community boasts three levels of excellent living space, featuring 4 spacious bedrooms and 3.5 bathrooms. This home offers the flexibility of two family room spaces. After a long day at work, gather in your main floor family room for some laid-back conversation to help unwind from the day. A cathedral ceiling and a cozy fireplace are the focal points of this room. Once dinner is complete, you can enjoy a movie in your lower-level rec room with its expansive TV wall and a bar, plus a kitchen-like area to make snacks. Or if you prefer, there is plenty of room for exercise equipment. Then the six-person jacuzzi right outside could be the perfect way to end your day! The gourmet kitchen, complete with a pantry, new quartz countertops and updated appliances, flows seamlessly into the family room, perfect for entertaining. Enjoy brand new luxury laminate plank and ceramic tile flooring throughout, along with energy-efficient windows and a cozy wood fireplace. Recent renovations in 2024-2025 enhance the property's appeal, while the fully finished daylight basement offers additional living space with custom wood bar, and kitchenette. All major updates include windows(2021), roof(2013), HVAC(2020), siding(2021) and egress window(2026), This outdoor space includes a deck, hot tub, and enclosed storage all set against a backdrop of endless open space views. Community amenities include a pool, basketball courts, and playgrounds, fostering a vibrant neighborhood atmosphere. Conveniently located within walking distance to schools, parks, and beautiful downtown Leesburg , this home offers both comfort and community engagement. With ample parking and a well-maintained yard, this property is a perfect blend of style and functionality.

Beautifully updated and move in ready! Main level boasts open space with cozy family room with fireplace and built in shelving, separate dining room, and updated kitchen with stainless appliances and custom island. Kitchen walks out to freshly stained and oversized deck backing to large flat back yard, common space, and trees. This home has a much desired two car garage entering into laundry/mud room. Upper level had three spacious bedrooms with large closets and two updated baths. Lower level is fully finished with new carpet, large rec room, bonus room, and large storage and utility area. Walk up stairs take you from the rec room to the beautiful back yard. Fresh paint and new lighting throughout. Enjoy close proximity to schools, shopping, community pool and more.

Welcome home to this spacious and beautifully maintained 4-bedroom, 2.5-bath residence situated on a premium corner lot in one of Leesburg's most sought-after communities. Thoughtfully designed for both everyday living and entertaining, this home offers bright, open living spaces, generously sized bedrooms, and a versatile floor plan to fit a variety of lifestyles. The heart of the home is the well-appointed kitchen featuring stainless steel appliances, gas cooking, double ovens, and abundant workspace, seamlessly connecting to both formal and casual dining areas. Upstairs, the expansive primary suite provides a private retreat with dual closets and a spa-inspired bath complete with double vanities, a jetted soaking tub, and a separate shower. The finished lower-level bonus room offers exceptional flexibility for a home office, fitness area, playroom, or guest space, while additional storage helps keep everything organized. Step outside to enjoy a large deck overlooking the fully fenced backyard-perfect for relaxing, entertaining, pets, or outdoor gatherings. Residents enjoy community amenities including a pool, playgrounds, and scenic walking paths, all just minutes from Bolen Park, downtown Leesburg shopping and dining, Compass Creek, and major commuter routes including Route 7, the Leesburg Bypass, and the Dulles Greenway. Combining space, comfort, and convenience, this is an opportunity you won't want to miss.

New price on this stunning Colonial with thoroughly updated flair. Points of note that make this home stand out: Newer premium roofing carry a 35 year transferable warranty; the garage is equipped with 2 car EV charging capability; Cat 5 wiring provides smart home security credentials and a top notch water filtration system adds to the hidden values list. Sited on a peaceful cul-de-sac in sought after Potomac Station, the home is set in the quiet of suburbia with easy access to paths and trail while recreation centers, fine dining, cultural events, sports venues and shopping are an easy drive away. Thoughtfully designed and recently renovated, the home features 4 spacious bedrooms and 3.5 bathrooms. Owners can retire in their private suite with a sizable sitting area and an en-suite bath featuring a 5-foot Jacuzzi soaking tub. Additional upstairs bedrooms are generously sized. On the main level, step into the two-story foyer and the floor plan features an expansive family room with fireplace, living room, formal dining room and an open concept updated kitchen boasting 2026 stainless steel appliances. The kitchen leads to a brand new 2026 gorgeous custom Trex deck with space enough for grills and smokers, making entertaining fun for family, friends or business as easy parking provides 2 spaces on the driveway in addition to the 2-car garage and further parking on the cul de sac. The laundry room features 2024 Speed Queen Washer and Dryer. A Kinetico water treatment and softener system added in 2024 and a whole house Honeywell Electronic Air Cleaner system provide optimal living conditions. A gas fired, hot water heater unit has been upgraded to 120 gallons to serve the sizable Jacuzzi soaking tub of the primary bathroom. The 2023 GAF Timberline roof is covered by a 35 year transferable warranty An expansive room with walkout to the lush backyard as well as a full bathroom make the finished part of the basement fit for any use your lifestyle may require. The 2-car garage features upgraded workshop electric with multiple 15 amp and 20 amp outlets as well as a 240 volt single phase service allowing faster EV charging or powerful DIY applications. Upgraded workshop wiring is also available in the 400 sq.ft. unfinished part of the basement which provides huge storage space. Access to Verizon 1.0 GB high speed service, Ethernet Category 5 hard wired throughout the house and proximity to the commuter bus lot, the Silver Line, and Government and Contractor and IT company offices in Chantilly, Dulles, Reston, Tyson's Corner, and Washington DC make this home perfect for work from home or occasional or regular commuting. **Some photos virtually staged.**

Welcome to this Ryan Homes-built detached residence offering 5 bedrooms, 3.5 bathrooms, and a 2-car garage in the highly sought-after Courtland Rural Village community. Designed for comfortable living and entertaining, the home features four bedrooms on the upper level and a fully finished walk-out basement. The lower level has been recently updated with brand-new luxury vinyl plank flooring, newly finished stairs, and fresh paint throughout. This versatile space includes a bedroom/den, full bathroom, wet bar, exercise room, and spacious recreation areas. The main level showcases hardwood flooring throughout and a thoughtfully designed layout. The gourmet kitchen features granite countertops, a breakfast bar, and an adjoining sunroom. Formal living and dining rooms provide elegant gathering spaces, while the kitchen opens to a dramatic two-story family room filled with natural light. Step outside to enjoy the relatively flat, fenced backyard with alley access. The walk-out lower level leads to a covered patio, providing year-round outdoor enjoyment, while the expansive deck with stair access offers breathtaking sunset views overlooking the historic Oatlands Historic House and Gardens. Meticulously maintained and move-in ready, this exceptional home offers the perfect combination of space, comfort, and scenic surroundings.

NEW PRICE + NEW LOOK + Freshly updated with stunning new staging, this home is move-in ready and located in one of Leesburg's highly sought-after communities. Welcome to 13583 Elysian Drive, where timeless design, thoughtful updates, and one of Leesburg's most desirable neighborhoods come together to create the perfect place to call home. This beautifully maintained 5-bedroom, 3.5-bath home offers over 3,500 finished square feet designed for the way families live today. From the moment you arrive, you'll appreciate the classic brick exterior, manicured landscaping, and inviting curb appeal that set the tone for what's inside. Step through the front door into light-filled living spaces featuring freshly painted interiors, brand-new carpeting, hardwood flooring, elegant moldings, and a flexible floor plan with formal living and dining rooms, a private home office, and a spacious family room centered on a cozy gas fireplace. The well-appointed kitchen serves as the heart of the home, with stainless steel appliances, abundant cabinetry, a large center island with seating, a generous pantry, and seamless access to the rear deck-perfect for entertaining or simply enjoying peaceful views of Sugarloaf Mountain with your morning coffee. Upstairs, the spacious primary suite offers a true retreat with a large walk-in closet and spa-inspired bath featuring dual vanities, a soaking tub, and oversized shower. Three additional bedrooms, a full hall bath, and an upstairs laundry room complete the second level. The fully finished walk-out lower level offers incredible flexibility, with a fifth bedroom, a full bath, an expansive recreation area, and abundant storage, ideal for movie nights, a home gym, a game room, or a guest suite. Significant recent improvements provide peace of mind, including a new roof (2025), new upper-level HVAC system (2024), brand-new carpeting, and fresh neutral paint throughout, making this home truly move-in ready. Beyond the home, you'll love the lifestyle that Leesburg offers. Located just steps from expansive community green space, residents enjoy sidewalks, walking trails, a community pool, clubhouse, tennis courts, playgrounds, and beautifully maintained open areas that create a welcoming neighborhood atmosphere. Virtually staged photos are intended to help buyers visualize the property's potential and may depict furnishings, decor, or finishes that are not present in the home.

Tucked away on 4.5 picturesque acres in the heart of Lucketts, this beautifully updated ranch offers the perfect blend of modern comfort and Loudoun County's beloved countryside lifestyle. With 4 bedrooms, 2 full bathrooms, and 1 half bath, this home has been thoughtfully renovated while preserving the peaceful charm that makes this area so special. The heart of the home underwent a stunning transformation in 2024, featuring a completely reimagined kitchen with premium Thermador appliances, beautiful new countertops, updated flooring, designer lighting, and an open, inviting flow into the living room, creating an ideal space for everyday living and entertaining alike. The finished basement was renovated in 2021, adding valuable living space along with a full bathroom, making it perfect for guests, recreation, or a private retreat. Outside, the expansive property with no HOA and beautiful landscaping offers endless possibilities. Whether you dream of gardening, entertaining under the stars, or simply enjoying wide-open views and peaceful evenings, this beautiful acreage provides the space and privacy to make it your own. Beyond the property, you'll discover why so many people fall in love with Lucketts. Known for its charming antique shops, welcoming small-town atmosphere, scenic back roads, and rich agricultural heritage, the community offers a lifestyle that's hard to replicate. Spend weekends exploring local wineries, breweries, farm markets, and vintage shops, or enjoy nearby outdoor destinations including Temple Hall Farm Regional Park, Morven Park, Ball's Bluff Battlefield, and the Potomac River. Despite its tranquil setting, you're just minutes from downtown Leesburg with easy access to Frederick, Dulles Airport, shopping, dining, and commuter routes. If you've been searching for a home that offers modern updates, beautiful land, and the unmistakable charm of Loudoun County's wine and farm country, this exceptional property is one you won't want to miss.
